image.title: NAE Bloise, J Zhang, J Nakpu, H Hamada, CE Dunk, S Li, GE Imperio, L Nadeem, M Kibschull, P Lye, SG Matthews, SJ Lye

item.title: Expression of severe acute respiratory syndrome coronavirus 2 cell entry genes, angiotensin-converting enzyme 2 and transmembrane protease serine 2, in the placenta across gestation and at the maternal-fetal interface in pregnancies complicated by preterm birth or preeclampsia.
